description_long: This kiosk is a visually striking structure featuring a traditional Japanese torii gate made of red-painted wood with a black curved top beam and decorative rope and paper streamers. Beneath the gate, a red vending machine with a display of products and a coin slot stands on a checkered mat, accompanied by a classic bicycle, a white paper parasol, and a small stone lantern. The torii gate dominates the scene, evoking a sense of cultural heritage, while the vending machine and bicycle add a modern urban touch. The mat beneath the objects provides a defined area, suggesting a designated spot for interaction. The materials range from wood and stone to metal and plastic, each contributing to the overall aesthetic. The combination of traditional and contemporary elements makes this kiosk a unique urban feature.
description: A Japanese torii gate kiosk with a vending machine, bicycle, parasol, and stone lantern on a checkered mat, blending traditional and modern urban elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the torii gate, vending machine, bicycle, parasol, and stone lantern clearly arranged on the mat.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back of the vending machine and the torii gate, with the bicycle and parasol partially visible.
description_view_2: Back view showing the rear of the torii gate and vending machine, with the bicycle and parasol seen from behind.
description_view_3: Side-rear view focusing on the torii gate's structure, the stone lantern, and the bicycle, with the vending machine mostly obscured.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign and product display on the front of the vending machine, integrated into the machine's structure, with visible product images and text.
attribute_roof_design: Curved, traditional Japanese torii gate roof made of wood with a black finish and decorative rope elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional Japanese with modern urban elements
